allow: Bash(powershell -Command "\(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri ''https://cg.optimizely.com/content/v2?auth=REDACTED'' -Method POST -Headers @{''Content-Type''=''application/json''} -Body ''{""query"":""query { Branch\(limit: 1000\) { items { Name City Coordinates } } }""}''\).Content | Select-String -Pattern ''Cape'' -AllMatches")

Bash(powershell -Command "$response = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri ''https://cg.optimizely.com/content/v2?auth=REDACTED'' -Method POST -Headers @{''Content-Type''=''application/json''} -Body ''{""query"":""query { Branch\(limit: 100, skip: 0\) { items { Name City Coordinates } } }""}''; $response.data.Branch.items | Where-Object { $_City -like ''*Cape*'' } | Format-Table")
